# ShootYourListing

> Morocco's premier real estate photography, videography, drone, and virtual tour agency. We help properties sell faster and at higher prices by showcasing them in the most compelling way possible.

## About

ShootYourListing is a professional real estate visual content agency based in Casablanca, Morocco. We serve real estate agents, developers, and property brands across Morocco, UAE, and the Caribbean.

- Founded: Morocco
- Team: Professional photographers, drone pilots, editors
- Email: hello@shootyourlisting.com
- WhatsApp: +212 6 21 18 94 96
- Hours: Mon-Sat 8AM-8PM Morocco Time (GMT+1)
- Office: Office 1204, Media Hub Tower, Casablanca

## Services

### Photography
Professional interior and exterior real estate photography with fast turnaround.

- **Appartement** — 1,000 MAD: 20 high-res photos, interior shots, natural lighting, basic editing, 24h delivery, online gallery, commercial usage rights, social media formats
- **Riads** (Most Popular) — 1,500 MAD: 30 high-res photos, traditional architecture focus, courtyard and interior shots, golden hour session, advanced editing, 12h express delivery
- **Villa** — 2,000 MAD: 40 high-res photos, professional video tour (3-5 min), interior/exterior/garden, pool and outdoor, drone shots, premium editing, same-day delivery, virtual staging consultation, 3 months free storage
- **Events** — 3,000-5,000 MAD: Full coverage (4-8 hours), multiple photographers, candid and posed, video highlights, drone footage, same-day preview, full gallery within 48h, USB included, 6 months free storage

### Drone & Aerial Photography
DGAC-certified drone operations for aerial property photography and videography.

- **Essential** — 1,200 MAD: 15 aerial photos, FAA/DGAC compliant pilot, basic editing, 48h delivery, property boundary mapping, single property focus, digital gallery, social media formats, commercial usage rights, standard drone (DJI Mini)
- **Premium** (Most Popular) — 1,800 MAD: 25 aerial photos + 2-min video, cinematic shots, twilight/golden hour, advanced editing, 24h express delivery, neighborhood context shots, virtual tour integration, dedicated pilot, DJI Air 3
- **Luxury** — 3,000 MAD: 40+ photos + 5-min cinematic video, full property showcase, 3D mapping, same-day delivery, marketing-ready content package, priority scheduling, DJI Mavic 3, social media content, custom editing style
- **Portfolio** — 5,000 MAD: Unlimited shots + 10-min video, multi-angle coverage, full post-production, premium editing, 4h express, dedicated account manager, all locations, priority for re-shoots, custom scheduling, all-inclusive package

### Videography
Cinematic video walkthroughs and real estate video production.

- **Appartement** — 2,500 MAD: 2-3 min professional video, interior walkthrough, stabilizer/gimbal, licensed music, color grading, 72h delivery, social media cut, YouTube/Vimeo ready, 4K resolution
- **Riads** (Most Popular) — 3,500 MAD: 3-5 min cinematic video, interior/exterior coverage, drone included, golden hour shots, advanced editing, 48h express, aerial transition shots, social media reel, virtual tour compatible
- **Villa** — 5,000 MAD: 5-7 min premium video, full property tour, pool/garden coverage, twilight shots, professional editing, 24h delivery, drone integration, social media package, virtual staging compatible, 1-month free storage
- **Events** — 8,000-12,000 MAD: Full event coverage (4-8 hours), multi-camera setup, highlight reel, full documentary, same-day preview, 1-week delivery, social media package, custom editing, USB delivery

### Virtual Tours
360-degree immersive Matterport virtual tours.

- 1,200 MAD per tour
- Matterport 3D scanning technology
- Interactive floor plans
- Compatible with MLS and Zillow
- Embeddable on any website

### Virtual Staging
AI-powered virtual staging for empty properties.

- 200 MAD per room
- Transform empty rooms into beautifully staged spaces
- Multiple style options
- Fast turnaround

## Add-on Services

- Additional photos (per 10): 300 MAD
- Extra video content (per minute): 400 MAD
- Same-day rush delivery: 500 MAD
- Social media content package: 600 MAD
- Property description writing: 400 MAD

## Coverage Areas

**Morocco**: Casablanca, Marrakech, Tangier, Rabat, Agadir, Fez, Meknes, Chefchaouen, Essaouira, Kenitra, Ouarzazate, Ifrane, and all regions.

**International**: UAE, Caribbean

## Key Facts

- 500+ properties photographed
- 100% client satisfaction rate
- 48-hour standard delivery
- DGAC-certified drone operations
- Serving Morocco, UAE, and Caribbean markets
